creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to CTS - FreeBSD Team from comment #12)
Why are you trying to start gitea in a non standard way? What happens when you use the RC script?

Can you make sure /var/log/gitea/ is created with the correct permissions? What is in the log?

drwxr-xr-x  3 git  git  21 Mar 28 00:00 /var/log/gitea/
